# Change history — pe-gra-context-information-design.prompt

## v1.5.0 — 2026-04-28

A7 — Added content-type-specific token budget table to Phase 3

## v1.4.0 — 2026-03-13T00:00:00Z

A4 — Added structured output formats to Phases 3, 4 (data contracts between phases)

A5 — Added YAML frontmatter to Phase 3 required structure list

## v1.3.0 — 2026-03-13T00:00:00Z

A3 — Added Out of Scope section with redirects to sibling prompts

## v1.2.0 — 2026-03-13T00:00:00Z

A2 — Added fetch_webpage to tool list for URL-based source material

## v1.1.0 — 2026-03-13T00:00:00Z

A1 — Added source prioritization guidance (Primary/Secondary/Tertiary/Exclude) to Phase 2 researcher handoff

## v1.1.0 — 2026-03-13T00:00:00Z

A1 — Added structured Phase 2 output format (research summary template)

## v1.1.0 — 2026-03-13T00:00:00Z

A6 — Added contradiction detection to Gate 2 (not just duplication)

## v1.1.0 — 2026-03-13T00:00:00Z

A6 — Added source classification gate check

## v1.0.0 — 2026-03-13T00:00:00Z

Initial version — 6-phase orchestrator following instruction-file-design pattern

## v1.0.0 — 2026-03-13T00:00:00Z

Includes all production-readiness requirements: response management, error recovery, embedded test scenarios, context rot prevention, goal alignment checks, concrete gate criteria

## v1.0.0 — 2026-03-13T00:00:00Z

Context-specific focus: single-source-of-truth validation, consumer impact analysis, token budget splitting
